# WordPress media library hack to speed up your site

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-03-01 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 580

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Today, I want to talk about an EASY website optimization trick
that helps you save money and improve the efficiency of your
website.

Spoiler alert: I am talking about cleaning up your WordPress
media library.

Every time you upload a media file, WordPress creates several
copies of it. The extra files are NOT used anywhere on your
website and can take up a lot of storage space on your hosting
server.

The problem is that

-  It increases the disk space your website takes up on your
hosting server, in turn increasing your hosting cost.

-  Increases the size of your WordPress backups, so taking
backups could be slower and sometimes they even fail.

Fortunately, there is an easy fix.

👉 How to Clean Up Your WordPress Media Library 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..h2oLjayah8WmXa7AH3lmsZuDRsLuK3oUtiwOmKlrFL4 )
 (3 Methods)

All you need to do is install a plugin and delete unused media
from your library.
